description: Integration, end-to-end wiring, Docker setup, and final project documentation. Wire frontend to backend, add Docker Compose for easy deployment, and update README with actual usage instructions.
steps: Create a top-level docker-compose.yml with services: backend (Python FastAPI, port 8000), frontend (Vite dev or nginx for prod, port 3000)
Create backend/Dockerfile - Python 3.11 slim, install ffmpeg, pip install deps, run uvicorn
Create frontend/Dockerfile - Node 22 alpine, build the React app, serve with nginx
Create a top-level .env.example with all required environment variables for both services
Ensure backend serves the frontend build as static files in production mode (backend/app/main.py serves frontend/dist/ at root if it exists)
Add a backend endpoint POST /api/videos/generate-full that orchestrates the entire pipeline (script -> TTS -> media -> assembly) as a single call with progress updates via Server-Sent Events (SSE)
Update frontend useVideoGeneration hook to support both step-by-step mode and full-pipeline mode with SSE progress streaming
Create backend/tests/test_integration.py - Integration test that mocks external APIs and tests the full pipeline flow

Update the top-level README.md with: project overview, architecture diagram (text), quick start guide (docker-compose up), manual setup instructions, environment variables reference, API documentation summary, screenshots/usage guide
Create a .gitignore at project root covering: __pycache__, .env, node_modules, dist, venv, output/, *.mp4, *.mp3, *.wav
acceptance_criteria: docker-compose.yml is valid YAML and defines both services correctly
Backend Dockerfile builds successfully: docker build -t abet-backend backend/
Frontend Dockerfile builds successfully: docker build -t abet-frontend frontend/
The SSE endpoint streams progress events for each pipeline stage
README.md contains complete setup and usage documentation
verification: pytest backend/tests/ -v (all tests pass including integration)
cd frontend && npm run build (still builds after changes)
